promptKey: 12x48 filled vertical rectangle, filling most of the canvas
prompt:
Draw a 12x48 filled vertical rectangle, filling most of the canvas on a PixelCanvas.
Colors: base="#0080FF", light="#80D4FF", dark="#0047AB", accent="#FFB400"
API: pc.fillCircle(cx, cy, r, idx), pc.fillRect(x,y,w,h,idx), pc.fillEllipse(cx,cy,rx,ry,idx), pc.setPixel(x,y,idx)
Color index: pal.groups.base.startIdx + (0=dark,1=mid,2=light,3=brightest)
Canvas: 12x48, origin top-left. Fill at least 30% of the canvas. Use at least 2 color groups.
Output drawBody: the drawing code as a string.
